raw_responses.BFI-10_1: Based on the interview, Michael describes himself as someone who enjoys his independence, has meaningful relationships with his family and friends, and values quiet stability and routine. Given these factors, it seems unlikely that Michael would be someone who is highly skeptical and wary of others.
